encounter.type: new patient office visit, establishment of primary care
encounter.reason: new patient evaluation, depression screening and treatment initiation
encounter.location: Hawthorne Health Center, 3847 SE Hawthorne Blvd, Portland, OR 97214

conditions.name: major depressive disorder, single episode, moderate to severe

medications.name: sertraline 50 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take one 50 mg tablet by mouth once daily in the morning with food
medications.reason: major depressive disorder, single episode, moderate to severe

document_references.description: Documents new patient establishment of care visit for a 25-year-old woman. Covers chief complaint of persistent low mood for six weeks, depression screening results (PHQ-2: 5, PHQ-9: 17), diagnosis of major depressive disorder (single episode, moderate to severe), initiation of sertraline 50 mg daily, routine new patient lab orders (CBC, CMP, TSH, lipid panel), allergy documentation (sulfa antibiotics), and follow-up plan in 4–6 weeks.

diagnostic_reports.description: Routine new patient baseline lab. Ordered at this visit; results not yet available.
